title: Conversation surface
subtitle: Reuse the existing LoongClaw runtime through a browser-first shell.
inputPlaceholder: Ask LoongClaw about runtime, tools, or workflow...

memoryWindow.label: Memory window
memoryWindow.hint: This is the local sliding window currently fed back into the prompt.

toolAssist.label: Tool assist
toolAssist.hint: Add a small Web-only hint for file, shell, repo-search, and webpage tasks.

errors.transportFailure: Provider connection failed while contacting {{host}}. If you use a proxy, route this host DIRECT and add it to fake-ip-filter. You can confirm the current diagnosis in Runtime console > Provider route.

loading.connectingA: LoongClaw is joining the flight path
loading.connectingC: LoongClaw is looking for stable air
loading.hintConnecting: The provider connection is still in progress. If there is no error yet, this turn still has a chance to complete.
loading.hintThinking: The request is already out. LoongClaw is waiting on or shaping the response.
loading.hintStreaming: Incremental text is already arriving. This turn is still actively generating.
